name: cc-praxis
description: Professional development skills for Claude Code — deep Java/Quarkus support plus universal principles for any project

bundles.name: quick-start-java
bundles.description: Get immediate value with 3 skills: safety-first development, code review that catches bugs before they ship, and smart commits that sync DESIGN.md automatically

bundles.name: quick-start-typescript
bundles.description: Get immediate value with 3 skills: strict-mode TypeScript development, code review catching type safety and async bugs, and conventional commits with issue linking

bundles.name: quick-start-python
bundles.description: Get immediate value with 3 skills: type-annotated Python development, code review catching bare excepts and injection risks, and conventional commits with issue linking

bundles.name: core
bundles.description: Universal workflow tools every project needs: commits, CLAUDE.md sync, architecture decisions, project health

bundles.name: principles
bundles.description: Universal foundations extended by language-specific skills: code review, security, dependencies, observability

bundles.name: java-quarkus
bundles.description: Java/Quarkus backend development: java-dev, quarkus-flow, code review, security audit, dependency management

bundles.name: typescript
bundles.description: TypeScript/Node.js development: ts-dev, code review, security audit, npm dependency management

bundles.name: python
bundles.description: Python development: python-dev, code review, security audit, pip dependency management

plugins.name: cc-praxis-ui
plugins.description: Launch the cc-praxis skill manager UI — browse, install, update, and uninstall skills

plugins.name: cc-praxis-check
plugins.description: Use when something seems wrong with cc-praxis — diagnoses CLAUDE.md, installed skills, session hook, and DESIGN.md with specific recovery steps for each issue

plugins.name: install-skills
plugins.description: One-time marketplace bootstrap: configure hooks and install skills

plugins.name: uninstall-skills
plugins.description: Remove marketplace skills and hooks with reverse dependency checking

plugins.name: code-review-principles
plugins.description: Universal code review principles covering safety, concurrency, performance, testing philosophy

plugins.name: security-audit-principles
plugins.description: Universal OWASP Top 10 security audit principles

plugins.name: dependency-management-principles
plugins.description: Universal dependency management principles for BOM patterns

plugins.name: observability-principles
plugins.description: Universal observability principles covering logging, tracing, and metrics

plugins.name: issue-workflow
plugins.description: GitHub issue tracking with cross-cutting detection, commit split suggestions, and release-based changelog

plugins.name: git-commit
plugins.description: Generic conventional commits with project type routing

plugins.name: blog-git-commit
plugins.description: GitHub Pages / Jekyll blog commits with content-specific conventions and validation

plugins.name: java-dev
plugins.description: Java/Quarkus development workflow

plugins.name: java-code-review
plugins.description: Java-specific code review extending code-review-principles

plugins.name: java-security-audit
plugins.description: Java/Quarkus OWASP Top 10 security audit

plugins.name: java-git-commit
plugins.description: Java project commits with DESIGN.md sync

plugins.name: java-update-design
plugins.description: DESIGN.md synchronization for Java projects

plugins.name: maven-dependency-update
plugins.description: Maven BOM dependency management

plugins.name: quarkus-flow-dev
plugins.description: Quarkus Flow workflow development

plugins.name: quarkus-flow-testing
plugins.description: Quarkus Flow testing patterns

plugins.name: quarkus-observability
plugins.description: Quarkus observability configuration

plugins.name: custom-git-commit
plugins.description: Custom project type commits with configurable sync

plugins.name: update-primary-doc
plugins.description: Generic primary document synchronization

plugins.name: update-claude-md
plugins.description: CLAUDE.md workflow documentation sync

plugins.name: adr
plugins.description: Architecture Decision Record creation

plugins.name: design-snapshot
plugins.description: Immutable dated record of design state — where we are, how we got here, where we're going

plugins.name: write-blog
plugins.description: Living project diary — captures decisions, pivots, and discoveries in the moment with honest diary voice, not polished retrospectives

plugins.name: publish-blog
plugins.description: Publish blog entries to external platforms — reads blog-routing.yaml to route entries per entry_type, tags, and projects to configured git destinations

plugins.name: handover
plugins.description: Generates a concise HANDOFF.md at session end — lazy references to design snapshots, project blog, and knowledge garden rather than loading them

plugins.name: idea-log
plugins.description: Lightweight living log for undecided possibilities — capture, review, promote, and discard ideas

plugins.name: ts-dev
plugins.description: TypeScript development workflow — strict mode, async patterns, error handling, testing

plugins.name: ts-code-review
plugins.description: TypeScript code review extending code-review-principles — type safety, async correctness

plugins.name: ts-security-audit
plugins.description: TypeScript/Node.js OWASP Top 10 security audit — injection, auth, SSRF, prototype pollution

plugins.name: npm-dependency-update
plugins.description: npm/yarn/pnpm dependency management extending dependency-management-principles

plugins.name: ts-project-health
plugins.description: Health checks for TypeScript/Node.js projects — extends project-health with TS-specific checks

plugins.name: python-dev
plugins.description: Python development workflow — type hints, async patterns, safety, testing with pytest

plugins.name: python-code-review
plugins.description: Python code review extending code-review-principles — type safety, async correctness, safety

plugins.name: python-security-audit
plugins.description: Python OWASP Top 10 security audit — injection, pickle deserialization, secrets, SSRF

plugins.name: pip-dependency-update
plugins.description: pip/poetry/pipenv dependency management extending dependency-management-principles

plugins.name: python-project-health
plugins.description: Health checks for Python projects — extends project-health with Python-specific checks

plugins.name: project-health
plugins.description: Universal project health checks — correctness, consistency, and compliance across all project types

plugins.name: project-refine
plugins.description: Improvement opportunities across docs and code — structure, deduplication, and bloat reduction

plugins.name: skills-project-health
plugins.description: Health checks for Claude Code skill collection repositories — extends project-health with skills-specific checks

plugins.name: java-project-health
plugins.description: Health checks for Java/Maven/Gradle projects — extends project-health with Java-specific checks

plugins.name: blog-project-health
plugins.description: Health checks for GitHub Pages/Jekyll blogs — extends project-health with blog-specific checks

plugins.name: custom-project-health
plugins.description: Health checks for custom projects — extends project-health with sync-rules and project-currency checks

plugins.name: retro-issues
plugins.description: One-off retrospective mapping of git history to GitHub epics and issues — analyses git log, ADRs, blog entries, and design docs; proposes structure for review before creating anything

plugins.name: workspace-init
plugins.description: One-time workspace setup — creates ~/claude/private/<project>/ with routing CLAUDE.md, gitignored project symlink, and full directory structure

plugins.name: epic-start
plugins.description: One-time setup per epic — creates project and workspace branches, scaffolds design/JOURNAL.md with SHA baseline, links or creates a GitHub issue, optionally invokes brainstorming

plugins.name: epic-close
plugins.description: Close an epic — routes artifacts per routing config, merges design/JOURNAL.md into project DESIGN.md, posts specs to GitHub issue, handles branch cleanup with approve-all or step-by-step option
